input.command:
echo -e "\n=== Testing savings API ===" && curl -s http://localhost:5000/api/savings?period=month | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
print('Status:', data['status'])
if data['status'] == 'success':
    print('Waste: $' + str(data['data']['total_waste_cost']))
    print('Saved: $' + str(data['data']['total_saved_cost']))
"

Saved: $0.0
